case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. SPENCER D. CRISSEY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. SERVED JAN-25-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRISSEY, SPENCER D.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $247.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $79.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CRISSEY, SPENCER D.

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (A) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CRISSEY, SPENCER D. DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009
